title: [profcheck][InstCombine] Preserve weights for xor statements
author: alanzhao1
description:
When simplifying an xor statement with logical boolean operands, we may be able to preserve branch weight data if the simplified instruction's conditional was the first operand of one of the two logical boolean inputs.

Tracking issue: #147390

tests.test_body:
define i1 @xor_and_or_negative_oneuse(i1 %c, i1 %x, i1 %y) {
  %o = or i1 %y, %c
  %a = and i1 %c, %x
  %r = xor i1 %a, %o
  call void @use(i1 %o)
  ret i1 %r
}

declare void @use(i1)
